sections.executive_summary:
This proposal covers the design, build, and launch of an AI-powered customer service system for [Company Name]. Based on our discovery call, your team is processing approximately [X] support tickets per month, with [Y]% being repeat or easily-answered inquiries. Our system will deflect an estimated 50–65% of those tickets automatically, saving an estimated [calculated hours] of staff time per month.

Project investment: $5,500 setup + $1,200/month ongoing management.
Estimated payback period: [X months] based on current support labor costs.
sections.problem_statement:
[Company Name] is growing, and support volume is growing with it. Your team is answering the same questions repeatedly: order status, return policy, sizing, product compatibility. These questions don't require human judgment — they require fast, accurate answers.

Today, that means a team member reads each ticket, composes a response, and moves on. At [X] tickets per month with an average handle time of [Y] minutes, that's [Z hours] per month in labor that could be automated. At $[hourly rate] fully loaded, that's $[monthly cost] per month.

Beyond cost, there's a customer experience problem: customers want answers in minutes, not hours. Your current response time of [X hours] is above the industry benchmark of [2-4 hours] for comparable brands. Every delayed response is a conversion that doesn't happen.
sections.proposed_solution:
We'll build a three-layer system:

**Layer 1: AI Chatbot (Website)**
A trained AI chatbot deployed on your website that can handle: order status lookups (via API connection to your order management system), return policy and process questions, product FAQs, sizing and compatibility questions, and basic troubleshooting. The bot knows when to escalate and does so cleanly — passing full context to the human agent so they don't have to ask the customer to start over.

**Layer 2: Automated Email Triage**
For support tickets coming via email, an AI triage system reads each ticket, categorizes it, and either (a) sends an automated response for standard inquiries, (b) drafts a suggested response for agent review on moderate-complexity tickets, or (c) routes to the appropriate specialist for complex issues. This doesn't just save time — it means your agents spend their time on tickets that actually need human judgment.

**Layer 3: Knowledge Base**
Both systems are powered by a structured knowledge base we build from your existing documentation, FAQ answers, product specs, and policies. This is the foundation that makes both layers reliable. We'll build it from scratch if needed, or significantly improve your existing one.
sections.deliverables_and_timeline:
**Week 1:** Support ticket audit (categorize 200+ historical tickets by type and frequency). Knowledge base audit or build.
**Week 2:** Knowledge base completion. Chatbot flow design and configuration.
**Week 3:** Email triage system setup. Integration with your order management and helpdesk systems.
**Week 4:** Testing with real tickets. Staff training (2-hour session). Soft launch.
**Week 5–6:** Live monitoring. Daily check-ins. Tuning based on real performance data.
**Month 2+:** Monthly monitoring reports, retraining on new content, ongoing optimization.
sections.investment:
**Setup: $5,500** (one-time)
Includes all discovery, knowledge base build, chatbot configuration, email triage setup, integrations, staff training, and 30-day post-launch monitoring.

**Monthly Management: $1,200/month**
Includes: performance reporting, ongoing retraining as products/policies change, new FAQ additions, quarterly optimization session.

**Total Year 1 Investment: $19,900**

**ROI Projection:**
- Current estimated monthly support labor cost: $[X]
- Projected monthly labor savings at 55% deflection: $[Y]
- Month 1 payback calculation: Setup cost ÷ monthly savings = [Z months] to break even
- Year 1 net benefit (savings minus investment): $[calculated]

These projections are conservative. Most clients see 60–70% deflection rates within 90 days as the system learns.
sections.team:
[Your Name] — AI Systems Architect. Responsible for project management, system architecture, and client communication.
[Optional: support specialist name] — Responsible for knowledge base build and chatbot training.
All work is yours at project completion — full documentation, credentials, and handover.
sections.next_steps:
**To begin:**
1. Confirm project scope and start date
2. Sign service agreement
3. Pay 50% setup fee ($2,750) to begin — remaining 50% due at launch
4. Provide helpdesk access, order management API credentials, and access to current support data
5. Kickoff call scheduled for [DATE]

I'll hold [DATE] as your provisional start date for 5 business days.

sections.executive_summary:
This proposal covers AI-powered customer service implementation for [SaaS Company], focused on two high-impact areas: automating repetitive onboarding questions and improving in-app support response times. The goal is to reduce time-to-value for new users while cutting support burden on your team.

Project investment: $6,500 setup + $1,500/month.
sections.problem_statement:
SaaS support has a specific challenge: onboarding questions spike when users first sign up, then taper off as they learn the product. Your team is spending a disproportionate amount of time answering 'how do I...' questions that are answered in your docs — but users don't want to read docs. They want immediate help.

Beyond onboarding, your in-app support experience is creating friction. Users who can't find answers quickly churn. Reducing first-response time from [current] to under 2 minutes has a direct impact on activation and retention rates.
sections.proposed_solution:
**1. Onboarding AI Assistant:** A conversational AI layer that guides new users through key setup steps, answers common how-to questions, and proactively surfaces relevant documentation — without requiring them to leave the product.

**2. In-App Support Bot:** Deployed within your app, trained on your entire documentation set, capable of answering product questions instantly and escalating to human support with full context when needed.

**3. Support Deflection Metrics:** Custom dashboard showing deflection rates, escalation patterns, and knowledge gaps (questions the bot couldn't answer that need documentation added).
sections.deliverables_and_timeline:
Week 1–2: Documentation audit and knowledge base preparation
Week 3–4: Onboarding assistant build and in-app bot configuration
Week 5: Integration with your helpdesk and in-app messaging platform
Week 6: QA, staff training, and launch
Month 2+: Monthly optimization and reporting
sections.investment: Setup: $6,500. Monthly: $1,500. Minimum 3-month management agreement post-launch.
sections.team: [Your Name] as lead. Full documentation and credentials provided at handover.
sections.next_steps: Confirm start date, sign agreement, provide app access and documentation access. Kickoff call at week 1.
